// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

internal static class EntitySerializerRegistration
{
    [System.Runtime.CompilerServices.ModuleInitializer]
    public static void Initialize()
    {
        EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance.Register<TestNamespace.Knows>(new TestNamespace.Generated.KnowsSerializer());
    }
}

// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
#pragma warning disable CS1591 // Missing XML comments for publicly visible type or members

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;
using Cvoya.Graph;
using Cvoya.Graph.Serialization;

namespace TestNamespace.Generated;

internal sealed class KnowsSerializer : IEntitySerializer
{
    private readonly EntitySerializerRegistry _serializerRegistry = EntitySerializerRegistry.Instance;
    public Type EntityType => typeof(TestNamespace.Knows);

    public object Deserialize(EntityInfo entity)
    {
        // Extracting value for parameter 'StartNodeId'
        string StartNodeId;
        // Look for property 'StartNodeId' in both simple and complex properties
        var startnodeidPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("StartNodeId", out var startnodeidSimpleProp) ? startnodeidSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("StartNodeId", out var startnodeidComplexProp) ? startnodeidComplexProp : null;
        // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
        StartNodeId = startnodeidPropRep is null
            ? string.Empty
            : startnodeidPropRep.Value is SimpleValue startnodeidPropRepSimpleValue
                ? (string)startnodeidPropRepSimpleValue.Object
                : string.Empty;
        // Extracting value for parameter 'EndNodeId'
        string EndNodeId;
        // Look for property 'EndNodeId' in both simple and complex properties
        var endnodeidPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("EndNodeId", out var endnodeidSimpleProp) ? endnodeidSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("EndNodeId", out var endnodeidComplexProp) ? endnodeidComplexProp : null;
        // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
        EndNodeId = endnodeidPropRep is null
            ? string.Empty
            : endnodeidPropRep.Value is SimpleValue endnodeidPropRepSimpleValue
                ? (string)endnodeidPropRepSimpleValue.Object
                : string.Empty;
        // Extracting init-only property 'Direction'
        Cvoya.Graph.RelationshipDirection directionValue;
        // Look for property 'Direction' in both simple and complex properties
        var directionPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Direction", out var directionSimpleProp) ? directionSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Direction", out var directionComplexProp) ? directionComplexProp : null;
        // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
        directionValue = directionPropRep is null
            ? RelationshipDirection.Outgoing
            : directionPropRep.Value is SimpleValue directionPropRepSimpleValue
                ? (Cvoya.Graph.RelationshipDirection)directionPropRepSimpleValue.Object
                : RelationshipDirection.Outgoing;
        // Extracting init-only property 'Id'
        string idValue;
        // Look for property 'Id' in both simple and complex properties
        var idPropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idSimpleProp) ? idSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Id", out var idComplexProp) ? idComplexProp : null;
        // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
        idValue = idPropRep is null
            ? Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N")
            : idPropRep.Value is SimpleValue idPropRepSimpleValue
                ? (string)idPropRepSimpleValue.Object
                : Guid.NewGuid().ToString("N");

        var result = new TestNamespace.Knows(
            StartNodeId,
            EndNodeId
        )
        {
            Direction = directionValue,
            Id = idValue
        };

        // Set remaining properties with setters
        // Look for property 'Since' in both simple and complex properties
        var sincePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Since", out var sinceSimpleProp) ? sinceSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Since", out var sinceComplexProp) ? sinceComplexProp : null;
        // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
        result.Since = sincePropRep is null
            ? 0
            : sincePropRep.Value is SimpleValue sincePropRepSimpleValue
                ? (int)sincePropRepSimpleValue.Object
                : 0;
        // Look for property 'Type' in both simple and complex properties
        var typePropRep = entity.SimpleProperties.TryGetValue("Type", out var typeSimpleProp) ? typeSimpleProp
                    : entity.ComplexProperties.TryGetValue("Type", out var typeComplexProp) ? typeComplexProp : null;
        // Extract simple value - no conversion, just cast
        result.Type = typePropRep is null
            ? string.Empty
            : typePropRep.Value is SimpleValue typePropRepSimpleValue
                ? (string)typePropRepSimpleValue.Object
                : string.Empty;
        return result;
    }

    public EntityInfo Serialize(object obj)
    {
        var entity = (TestNamespace.Knows)obj;
        var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();
        var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, Property>();

        // Serialize property: Since
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows).GetProperty("Since")!;
            var value = entity.Since;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                Object: value!,
                Type: typeof(int)
            );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Since",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Since"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: StartNodeId
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Relationship).GetProperty("StartNodeId")!;
            var value = entity.StartNodeId;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "StartNodeId",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["StartNodeId"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: EndNodeId
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Relationship).GetProperty("EndNodeId")!;
            var value = entity.EndNodeId;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "EndNodeId",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["EndNodeId"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Direction
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Relationship).GetProperty("Direction")!;
            var value = entity.Direction;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = new SimpleValue(
                Object: value!,
                Type: typeof(Cvoya.Graph.RelationshipDirection)
            );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Direction",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Direction"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Relationship).GetProperty("Id")!;
            var value = entity.Id;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Id",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Id"] = propertyRep;
        }

        // Serialize property: Type
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(Cvoya.Graph.Relationship).GetProperty("Type")!;
            var value = entity.Type;
            Serialized? serializedValue;

            serializedValue = value is null
                ? null
                : new SimpleValue(
                    Object: value,
                    Type: typeof(string)
                );

            var propertyRep = new Property(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                Label: "Type",
                IsNullable: false,
                Value: serializedValue
            );
            simpleProperties["Type"] = propertyRep;
        }

        var relationshipType = !string.IsNullOrEmpty(entity.Type) ? entity.Type : "KNOWS";
        return new EntityInfo(
            ActualType: typeof(TestNamespace.Knows),
            Label: relationshipType,
            ActualLabels: new List<string>(),
            SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
            ComplexProperties: complexProperties
        );
    }

    private static readonly HashSet<Type> _currentlyProcessing = new();
    private static readonly Dictionary<Type, EntitySchema> _schemaCache = new();

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for Knows.
    /// </summary>
    public EntitySchema GetSchema()
    {
        return KnowsSerializer.GetSchemaStatic();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the schema information for Knows.
    /// </summary>
    public static EntitySchema GetSchemaStatic()
    {
        var typeKey = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows);

        // Return cached schema if available
        if (_schemaCache.TryGetValue(typeKey, out var cachedSchema))
            return cachedSchema;

        // Check if we're already processing this type (circular reference)
        if (_currentlyProcessing.Contains(typeKey))
        {
            // Return a schema without nested schemas to break the cycle
            return new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.Knows),
                Label: "KNOWS",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>(),
                ComplexProperties: new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>()
            );
        }

        // Mark this type as being processed
        _currentlyProcessing.Add(typeKey);

        try
        {
            // Build the actual schema
            var simpleProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
            var complexProperties = new Dictionary<string, PropertySchema>();
        // Schema for property: Type
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows).GetProperty("Type")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.IRelationship).GetProperty("Type")!;
            simpleProperties["Type"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Type",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Direction
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows).GetProperty("Direction")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.IRelationship).GetProperty("Direction")!;
            simpleProperties["Direction"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Direction",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: StartNodeId
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows).GetProperty("StartNodeId")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.IRelationship).GetProperty("StartNodeId")!;
            simpleProperties["StartNodeId"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "StartNodeId",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: EndNodeId
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows).GetProperty("EndNodeId")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.IRelationship).GetProperty("EndNodeId")!;
            simpleProperties["EndNodeId"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "EndNodeId",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Id
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows).GetProperty("Id")
                ?? typeof(Cvoya.Graph.IEntity).GetProperty("Id")!;
            simpleProperties["Id"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Id",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }

        // Schema for property: Since
        {
            var propInfo = typeof(TestNamespace.Knows).GetProperty("Since")!;
            simpleProperties["Since"] = new PropertySchema(
                PropertyInfo: propInfo,
                PropertyName: "Since",
                PropertyType: PropertyType.Simple,
                IsNullable: false
            );
        }


            var schema = new EntitySchema(
                ExpectedType: typeof(TestNamespace.Knows),
                Label: "KNOWS",
                IsNullable: true,
                IsSimple: false,
                SimpleProperties: simpleProperties,
                ComplexProperties: complexProperties
            );

            // Cache the complete schema
            _schemaCache[typeKey] = schema;
            return schema;
        }
        finally
        {
            // Remove from processing set
            _currentlyProcessing.Remove(typeKey);
        }
    }
}
